text.title: Internal RFC Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: frame-problem
step.action: Write the problem in ≤200 words; pin stakeholders by name.

step.name: log-open-questions
step.action: List ≥1 open question with assigned discussant.
